name: gladiator-loop
description: Competitive agent learning loop adapted from GLADIATOR/Hermes. Work → create skill → reuse skill → refine → merge knowledge across teams.

capabilities.skill_auto_creation: Agents autonomously create SKILL.md files when completing complex tasks
capabilities.skill_reuse: Subsequent tasks reference learned skills — tracked via usage events
capabilities.skill_versioning: Each refinement bumps version — formula: tasks*8 + unique_skills*5 + versions*3
capabilities.persistent_memory: MEMORY.md per agent persists strategy notes and learnings across sessions
capabilities.session_chaining: Session IDs chain across heartbeats for continuity
capabilities.knowledge_merge: Post-competition: merge skills across teams/agents for cross-pollination
capabilities.token_optimization: 30-85% token reduction on tasks with cached skills

rules: Every complex task completion should check if a reusable skill can be extracted
Skills are stored in core/skills/{name}/manifest.json (DOF format, not raw SKILL.md)
Usage tracking: times_used, times_refined, token_savings_pct per skill
Merge is explicit and audited — not automatic
All skill lifecycle events logged to skill_audit.jsonl
